stories.headline: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani orders citywide shutdown as snowstorm hits
stories.description: The city’s entire traffic network is shut down except for emergency travel as a severe snowstorm hits northeast US.

stories.headline: Pakistan claims at least 70 fighters killed in strikes along Afghan border
stories.description: Afghan officials accuse Pakistan of targeting civilians and violating its sovereignty in Sunday’s border air raids.

stories.headline: The Ukraine war in numbers: People, territory, money
stories.description: Four years into Russia’s grinding war on Ukraine, Al Jazeera looks at the costs — to people, territory and treasuries.

stories.headline: ICC to hold hearings on charges against ex-Philippine President Duterte
stories.description: Duterte faces three counts of crimes against humanity allegedly committed during his time as president and Davao mayor.

stories.headline: Violence erupts in Mexico after drug lord El Mencho killed
stories.description: The death of the most-wanted Jalisco cartel chief sparks retaliatory violence in at least a dozen states in Mexico.
